name: Broken Elf Slave - Yours to shatter
description:
Local slave selling shops have been packing up shop as massive market conglomerates establish themselves. Most shops have ended up selling their stock to the markets, but the markets don't bother with the lower end and damaged slaves.

You receive a message from your friend Dugan. He's run a slave shop for the past thirty years and you've bought more than a couple slaves from him. Arriving at his shop the place is a lot more threadbare than you've even seen it. Dugan is packing up shop. It's the end of an era, but he's got a final gift for you.

This character is much darker than my usual character which are usually smutty with a good amount of fluff to it. This one is meant purely to be a dead dove smut character. Let me know your thoughts on this character and any ideas for it. I'm still very amateur and making characters but would LOVE to improve.

Content warning. Contains heavy themes of: slavery, physical abuse, maiming, sexual assaul, and ra*e
creator: Starwarsgeek42
